Professional Author Website Design Services

Build a professional author website that showcases your work, connects with readers, and strengthens your online presence. At Experts Self Publishing, we create websites designed to help authors grow with confidence.
Expand Your Reach with Your Own Author Website
A professional author website helps you build your brand, connect with readers, and showcase your books, all in one place.

Your author website is more than an online presence, it's where readers discover your story, explore your books, and connect with you. A well-designed website builds credibility, strengthens your brand, and leaves a lasting impression.

At Experts Self Publishing, we create professional, personalized author websites that reflect your unique voice. From design and content to a seamless user experience, we make it easy to build a website that helps grow your audience and promote your books with confidence.
From Manuscript to Published Success
Let Your Story Reach the Right Readers
Turn your manuscript into a professionally published book with the support of our publishing experts. We're here to guide you every step of the way and help your story reach readers around the world.
Author Websites That Connect with Readers

Your author website is more than a digital portfolio, the foundation of your personal brand and the place where readers get to know the person behind the pages. It's where they discover your books, learn about your journey, and decide whether to become lifelong readers.

At Experts Self Publishing, we create custom author websites that reflect your unique voice and writing style while delivering a polished, professional experience. Every website is thoughtfully designed with clean layouts, intuitive navigation, and compelling content that keeps visitors engaged and encourages them to explore more.

Whether you're introducing your debut novel or showcasing an entire collection, your website should make it easy for readers to browse your books, learn about upcoming releases, subscribe to your newsletter, and connect with you. We carefully structure every page to create a seamless experience that builds trust and strengthens your online presence.
The result is a site that works while you write. No hidden fees. No confusing tech. Just a reliable space for your growing audience.
Your Vision, Our Expertise
Complete Publishing Solutions for Authors

Every author deserves a team that understands the passion and dedication behind every story. At Experts Self Publishing, we provide expert guidance and professional publishing services to help turn your manuscript into a published book. We're here to make your publishing journey simple, smooth, and rewarding.
FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
Common Questions About Author Websites

Creating an author website is one of the best ways to build your online presence and connect with readers. Here, we've answered some of the most common questions about author website design, features, and how a professional website can help grow your audience and promote your books.
Do I Need an Author Website If I Use Social Media?

Yes. While social media helps you connect with readers, your author website is your permanent online home. It gives readers a trusted place to explore your books, learn about your journey, and connect with you, all while giving you complete control over your author brand.
How Long Does It Take to Build an Author Website?

Most author websites are completed within 2-3 weeks, depending on the project's scope. We follow a clear process, keep you involved at every stage, and ensure your website is professionally designed, polished, and ready to showcase your work.
Will My Website Help Sell More Books?

Yes. A professionally designed author website makes it easier for readers to discover your books, learn about your work, and purchase with confidence. We create websites that showcase your books, highlight reviews, and guide visitors toward becoming loyal readers.
Can I Update My Website After It's Live?

Yes. We build your website on an easy-to-manage platform, allowing you to update content, add new books, and make changes whenever you need. No technical experience is required, and we'll provide the guidance you need to manage your site with confidence.
What If I Have Multiple Books or a Series?

No problem. We design your website to grow with your publishing journey. Whether you have multiple books or an entire series, your site will be organized, easy to navigate, and ready to showcase every new release as your collection grows.
Will My Author Website Be Mobile-Friendly?

Absolutely. Every website we create is fully responsive, ensuring it looks and performs perfectly on smartphones, tablets, and desktops. Your readers will enjoy a smooth browsing experience on any device.

paragraphs: Your Book Deserves the Spotlight
Book PR & Publicity Services
Get your book in front of the right audience with strategic PR and publicity solutions. we help you build visibility, connect with readers, and create lasting buzz around your book.
Get Your Book Noticed
Professional PR & Publicity Services

Standing out takes more than publishing a great book. We use targeted PR and publicity strategies to connect your book with readers, reviewers, and media outlets, helping your story get the attention it deserves.

Your book has a story worth sharing, but reaching the right audience takes more than simply publishing it. At Experts Self Publishing, we create strategic PR and publicity campaigns that help your book gain attention from readers, reviewers, bloggers, influencers, and media outlets.

Every book is different, so we tailor our approach to match your goals. From media outreach and online promotion to author branding and book publicity, our team focuses on building genuine awareness that keeps your book in front of the right audience.
With the right publicity strategy, your book can reach farther, attract more readers, and continue making an impact long after its release.
Turn Your Manuscript into Success
Bring Your Book to the Readers Who Matter
Publishing is only the beginning. With the right guidance and promotion, your book can reach a wider audience and leave a lasting impression. Let our experts help you every step of the way.
Strategic Book PR Begins with the Right Plan

Every successful publicity campaign starts with understanding your book and the readers you want to reach. At Experts Self Publishing, we create personalized PR strategies based on your goals, genre, and target audience. Instead of using generic promotions, we focus on meaningful opportunities that help your book gain real attention.

Our PR and publicity services include media outreach, book reviews, podcast features, interviews, blog promotions, and online marketing designed to increase your visibility. We work to strengthen your author brand while helping your book reach readers through trusted platforms and media channels.

Every campaign is carefully planned to match your budget and publishing goals. We believe lasting visibility comes from the right strategy, consistent promotion, and genuine audience engagement, not one-time publicity.
With a focused approach and ongoing support, we help your book build momentum, attract new readers, and continue making an impact long after its launch.
Your Vision, Our Commitment
Complete Publishing Solutions for Authors
Every author deserves a team that understands the dedication, challenges, and passion behind every book. With expert guidance and professional publishing services.
FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
Common Questions About Book PR & Publicity

Book publicity helps your story reach the right audience through strategic promotion and media exposure. Here are answers to some of the most common questions about our PR and publicity services, and how they can help increase your book's visibility and connect you with more readers.
Do I Need PR If I Already Use Social Media?

Yes. Social media helps you connect with your existing audience, but PR expands your reach to new readers. Through media coverage, interviews, podcasts, and online features, your book gains greater visibility and credibility, helping you reach people beyond your social channels.
When Should I Start PR & Publicity for My Book?

For the best results, we recommend starting your PR and publicity campaign 2-3 months before your book launch. This gives enough time to build awareness, secure media opportunities, and create excitement, helping your book reach more readers when it goes live.
What Results Can I Expect from Book PR?

Results vary depending on your book, audience, and campaign goals. A successful PR strategy can increase your visibility through media coverage, podcast interviews, book reviews, and online features. Over time, these opportunities help build credibility, expand your audience, and create lasting awareness for your book.
Is Book Publicity Expensive?

Book publicity can be tailored to fit different budgets. We create cost-effective PR strategies that focus on the opportunities most likely to reach your target audience. Our goal is to maximize your visibility with a campaign that delivers real value without unnecessary expenses.
Can PR Help If My Book Was Published Some Time Ago?

Absolutely. It's never too late to promote your book. A well-planned PR campaign can introduce your title to new readers through fresh media opportunities, online features, and targeted publicity. With the right strategy, your book can continue gaining visibility and attracting readers long after its original release.
How Do You Measure the Success of a PR Campaign?

We measure success through meaningful results, including media coverage, podcast appearances, book reviews, increased website traffic, and audience engagement. Every campaign is focused on expanding your reach, building your author brand, and connecting your book with readers who are most likely to engage with your work.

Professional Book Editing & Proofreading Services

Give your manuscript the professional finish it deserves with expert editing and proofreading. We refine your writing, improve clarity, eliminate errors, and ensure your book is polished, engaging, and ready for publication.
Perfect Every Page with
Expert Editing & Proofreading Services

Every great book begins with a strong manuscript, but careful editing brings it to life. Our professional editors refine your writing, improve clarity, correct errors, and preserve your unique voice, ensuring your book is polished, engaging, and ready for publication.

A professionally edited book makes a lasting impression. Great editing strengthens your writing while preserving your unique voice. We carefully review every manuscript to improve clarity, flow, and readability, making sure your story connects with readers from beginning to end.

Our editing and proofreading services cover grammar, spelling, punctuation, sentence structure, and consistency. We also provide professional book formatting, ensuring your manuscript is polished and ready for both print and digital publishing.

Every book deserves an editor who understands its genre and audience. Our experienced editors refine your manuscript with thoughtful feedback and practical suggestions that enhance your work without changing your writing style.
From the first page to the final proof, we work closely with you to perfect every detail. The result is a professional manuscript that is clear, engaging, and ready to be published with confidence.
From Draft to a Polished Manuscript
Let Your Story Shine with Professional Editing

Talk to our editing experts and get the support you need to refine your manuscript. From proofreading to in-depth editing, we help transform your work into a polished book that's ready for publication.
How Affordable Book Editing That Brings Out the Best in Your Story

Every great book deserves careful editing. Our goal is to help you strengthen your manuscript without changing your unique voice. From the first review to the final proofread, every edit is made to improve clarity, consistency, and the overall reading experience.

Our editing services include developmental editing, line editing, copyediting, proofreading, and professional formatting. Each stage focuses on refining your manuscript, correcting errors, improving sentence flow, and ensuring every page is ready for publication.

We believe editing should feel collaborative, not overwhelming. That's why you'll receive honest feedback, thoughtful suggestions, and complete transparency throughout the process. You remain in control of your manuscript while we help polish it into a professional book you'll be proud to publish.
Your Vision, Our Expertise
Complete Publishing Solutions for Every Author

Every author deserves a team that understands the dedication, challenges, and passion behind every book. With professional publishing services, personalized guidance, and expert support, we help simplify the publishing process and give you the confidence to share your story with readers around the world.
FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
Common Questions About Editing & Proofreading

Professional editing helps refine your manuscript while preserving your unique voice. Here are answers to some of the most common questions about our editing and proofreading services, the editing process, and how we help prepare your book for publication.
What Is the Difference Between Editing and Proofreading?

Editing focuses on improving the overall quality of your manuscript, including clarity, structure, flow, and readability. Proofreading is the final review that corrects spelling, grammar, punctuation, and formatting errors before your book is published. Both services work together to ensure your manuscript is polished and publication-ready.
Which Editing Service Is Right for My Manuscript?

The right editing service depends on the stage of your manuscript. If you've completed your first draft, developmental editing can strengthen your content and structure. If your manuscript is nearly finished, line editing, copyediting, or proofreading may be the best choice. Our team will review your work and recommend the editing service that best fits your needs.
Will an Editor Change My Writing Style?

No. A professional editor works to strengthen your writing while preserving your unique voice and style. Our goal is to improve clarity, flow, and readability without changing the personality of your story, so your book still feels authentically yours.
How Long Does the Editing Process Take?

The editing timeline depends on your manuscript's length and the level of editing required. Most projects are completed within 2 to 4 weeks. Before we begin, you'll receive a clear schedule so you know exactly what to expect throughout the editing process.
How Do I Know Which Editor Is Right for My Book?

We match your manuscript with an editor who has experience in your book's genre and style. Our team carefully reviews your project to ensure you receive expert feedback, thoughtful editing, and guidance that best supports your story and publishing goals.
What If I Disagree with the Editor's Suggestions?

That's completely your choice. Our editors provide professional recommendations to strengthen your manuscript, but you remain in full control of every change. We explain our suggestions clearly, giving you the confidence to accept, revise, or decline any edits based on your vision for the book.

Will the Final Book Still Reflect My Voice?

Yes, preserving your unique voice is at the heart of our ghostwriting process. Our writers take the time to understand your ideas, personality, writing style, and message through detailed conversations and feedback.

How Involved Will I Be in the Writing Process?
Your level of involvement is completely up to you. Some authors prefer to review every chapter and provide detailed feedback, while others share their ideas and let the writer handle the process.

The right writer makes the entire process seamless, collaborative, and rewarding.
What Is the Timeline for a Ghostwritten Book?

The timeline depends on the length, genre, and complexity of your project. A business book may take around four to six months, while novels and memoirs often require additional time for research, development, and revisions.

We create clear milestones throughout the process so you always know the progress of your book. Whether you have a launch date, speaking engagement, or personal goal, our team works efficiently to help bring your manuscript to completion while maintaining quality and authenticity.
Do I Retain Full Rights to the Book?

Yes, you maintain complete ownership of your book. Our ghostwriting services are designed so that the final manuscript belongs entirely to you, giving you full rights to publish, distribute, and adapt your work as you choose.

There are no hidden restrictions, ongoing obligations, or royalty requirements. Your ideas, your story, and your finished book remain fully yours. We simply provide the writing expertise needed to bring your vision to life.

Frequently Asked Questions
Common Questions About Book Publishing

Publishing a book is an important milestone, and it's natural to have questions along the way. Our team is here to provide clear answers, honest guidance, and reliable support, making the publishing process simple, transparent, and easy to understand from beginning to end.
What is the difference between self-publishing and hybrid publishing?

Self-publishing gives you complete control over your book, allowing you to make every creative and publishing decision. Hybrid publishing combines professional publishing support with greater author involvement, giving you expert assistance while keeping you part of the process. We explain both options clearly, helping you choose the publishing path that best matches your goals, timeline, and budget.
How long does the publishing process take?

The publishing timeline depends on your manuscript and the services you choose. Most books are ready for publication within a few months, including editing, formatting, cover design, and publishing preparation. Before we begin, we provide a clear timeline so you know what to expect at every stage of the process.
Do I retain the rights to my book?

Yes. You remain the full owner of your book and all its rights. We do not claim ownership or take control of your work. You decide where your book is published, how it is priced, and what happens next. Our role is to provide professional publishing support while ensuring you stay in complete control of your work.
Will my book be available in bookstores?

Yes. We help make your book available through major online retailers and expanded distribution networks, giving it the opportunity to reach both online readers and bookstore shelves. Our team manages the publishing setup and distribution process, so you know where your book will be available and how readers can find it.
Can you help if I've already self-published my book?

Yes. We regularly work with authors who have already published their books and want to improve the final result. Whether you need a new cover design, professional formatting, editing, or updated publishing support, our team can help enhance your book and prepare it for a stronger release. It's never too late to improve your published work.
How much does it cost to publish with you?

The cost depends on your book, the services you need, and the scope of your project. We offer clear, upfront pricing with no hidden charges. After learning more about your manuscript and publishing goals, we'll provide a detailed quote so you know exactly what's included before the project begins.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
Common Questions About Book Publishing

Publishing a book comes with many questions, and having the right guidance makes the process easier. From publishing options to marketing strategies, we help authors understand each step clearly. Our goal is to provide the support and direction you need to turn your manuscript into a successful published book.
When should I start marketing my book?

The ideal time to begin marketing your book is three to four months before launch. This allows enough time to build anticipation, collect early reviews, prepare promotional campaigns, and reach your target readers. Starting early creates steady momentum and helps your book gain stronger visibility instead of relying on last-minute efforts.
Do I need a big budget to market my book?

Not necessarily. Effective book marketing is about strategy, not just spending more money. With the right approach, even a small budget can create meaningful results. We focus on the platforms, audiences, and strategies that work best for your genre, helping you invest wisely and reach the readers who matter most.
What if my book has been out for a while?

That's completely fine. A book can continue finding new readers long after its release. We create fresh marketing strategies by exploring new audiences, seasonal opportunities, updated promotions, and different ways to increase visibility. With the right approach, an older title can gain renewed attention and reach readers who may have missed it before.
How do you measure marketing success?

We focus on meaningful results, not just numbers on a screen. We track key factors like sales growth, reader engagement, reviews, audience growth, and overall visibility. The goal is to build genuine connections with readers who enjoy your work, recommend it to others, and help your book grow over time.
Can I do marketing myself without hiring an agency?

Yes, many authors handle their own marketing with the right time and dedication. However, effective promotion requires consistency, strategy, and ongoing effort. If you prefer to focus on writing while experts manage campaigns, audience targeting, and execution, professional support can make the process easier while keeping you involved in every important decision.
What marketing channels work best for authors?

The best marketing channels depend on your genre, audience, and publishing goals. Different readers connect on different platforms, so we create strategies based on where your ideal audience spends time. From social media and email campaigns to reader communities and promotional platforms, we choose the channels that best fit your book and help maximize its reach

I would confidently choose them again for future publishing projects.

The team quickly resolved the issues, republished my book with great care, and delivered results that exceeded my expectations. Pamela Drake

The professionalism and guidance I received made the publishing process easy to understand. Every question was answered with patience, and I felt supported from beginning to end. The reassurance, attention to detail, and quality of the finished book left me completely satisfied with the overall experience.

paragraphs: Our Journey Creating Success Stories Together
Receive personalized support designed around your writing goals. Reach out to get professional guidance and the right resources to help bring your story to life with confidence and clarity.
How does the eBook publishing process work?

The eBook publishing process starts by understanding your goals and vision. We guide you through each stage, including planning, editing, formatting, and final preparation. Once everything is approved, your eBook is published and made available across major platforms, helping you reach more readers with a professional finish.
Who controls the content of my book?

You remain in complete control of your book from start to finish. Our team works with you to improve and refine your manuscript while respecting your ideas, voice, and vision. Every change is made with your approval, ensuring your story stays authentic and true to your original intent.
How long does it take to publish a book?

The publishing timeline depends on your book's length, complexity, and the level of editing and revisions required. Most projects take several weeks to a few months from the initial consultation to final release. We keep the process organized with clear timelines, regular updates, and guidance at every stage.
Do I retain copyright for my book?

Yes. You maintain complete copyright ownership of your book and creative work. All rights remain with you, including the ability to publish, distribute, and adapt your content. We provide professional guidance throughout the process while ensuring your work stays protected and your ownership remains secure.
What formats will my book be available in?

Your eBook can be prepared in popular digital formats that work smoothly across major devices and publishing platforms. We ensure professional formatting, proper layout, and excellent readability so your book provides a seamless experience for readers worldwide.
How is my book marketed after publishing?

After publishing, we help promote your book with marketing strategies designed around your target audience. From digital promotions and retailer visibility to audience engagement efforts, we focus on increasing discoverability, attracting readers, and building long-term awareness for your book.
Start Your Publishing Journey Today!

Your story deserves the right support to reach readers. We help transform your ideas into a polished, professional book through expert guidance, careful editing, and a smooth publishing process. From the first draft to the final release, we keep you involved, informed, and confident at every stage.
Your book is more than a publication - it is a story built to connect, inspire, and leave a lasting impression.
